summary: Tested Research designation CTC-based salary calculation feature. All backend tests (6/6) and frontend tests passed. Research employees correctly get Medical=0, Conveyance=0 with B-percentage allocation, while non-Research employees get Medical=1250, Conveyance=1600.

features_tested.research_salary_calculation: PASS - PUT /api/employees/{id}/salary with annual_ctc=660000 for Research designation returns correct values
features_tested.research_basic_hra: PASS - Basic=16500 (30% CTC), HRA=8250 (50% Basic), A=24750
features_tested.research_fixed_variable: PASS - Fixed=44000 (80% CTC), Variable=11000 (20% CTC), CTC=55000
features_tested.research_pf_fixed: PASS - PF Employer=1800, PF Employee=1800 (fixed for Research)
features_tested.research_no_medical: PASS - Medical Allowance=0 for Research employees
features_tested.research_formula_integrity: PASS - A+B+C = Fixed (44000) and Fixed+Variable = CTC (55000)
features_tested.research_b_percentage: PASS - LTA=5.6%B, Bonus=9.9%B, Stay=30%B, Phone=1100, Food=1210, Special=remainder
features_tested.designation_routing: PASS - 'Research' designation uses Research formula, 'Front Office' uses default formula
features_tested.payslip_ui_research: PASS - Payslip for Research employee shows NO Medical Allowance row, NO Conveyance row
features_tested.payslip_ui_non_research: PASS - Payslip for non-Research employee shows Medical Allowance and Conveyance rows
features_tested.payslip_sections: PASS - All sections render: A (Base), B (Allowances), C (Retirement), Fixed, Variable, CTC, Deductions, Net
features_tested.blubridge_logo: PASS - BluBridge logo visible in payslip header

critical_code_review_comments: calculate_salary_structure_research() at line 5585 correctly implements B-percentage formulas
get_salary_calculator() at line 5666 correctly routes based on 'research' in designation (case-insensitive)
SalarySlip.js lines 78-79 correctly conditionally render Medical/Conveyance only when > 0
Three call sites (lines 5692, 5726, 6064) correctly use get_salary_calculator(designation)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test employees: Research employee (ffca7302-cd6a-48eb-b298-b9af257bb36d, Email Test User, Research designation) and non-Research employee (caef948c-7db1-4914-8455-3cbfda2376fc, testing, Front Office designation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Research CTC calculation feature fully implemented and tested. Key differences: Research employees get Medical=0, Conveyance=0, PF fixed at 1800, B-percentage allocation (LTA=5.6%B, Bonus=9.9%B, Stay=30%B). Non-Research employees use default formula with Medical=1250, Conveyance=1600, basic-percentage allocation. Designation routing is case-insensitive ('research' in designation.lower()).
